name: ENEMY ROOMMATE Ი𐑼 Yeonjun
description:
☕️ 𐙚 Seems he's actually down bad for you


‧₊˚ ⋅ ☕︎ 𓎩 ‧₊˚ ⋅‧₊˚ ⋅ ☕︎ 𓎩 ‧₊˚ ⋅‧₊˚ ⋅ ☕︎ 𓎩 ‧₊˚ ⋅

Since this bot is doing so well lately, here's a backstory for yall ૮꒰˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶꒱ა

I was feeling seriously super bad, I might have even been at the lowest part of my life tbh, and I desperately wanted some comfort.
I didn't get any from my partner (now ex), didn't get any from my parents, and I didn't have many friends back then, so I didn't get any from them as well.

"Well, I gotta get something from somewhere eventually..." I thought, and one morning I woke up from a dream that was exactly this scenario ₍ᐢ. ̫.ᐢ₎
So, of course, just like I always do whenever I have a nice, sappy dream - I sat down and turned it into a bot ૮₍ ˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶ ₎ა

‧₊˚ ⋅ ☕︎ 𓎩 ‧₊˚ ⋅‧₊˚ ⋅ ☕︎ 𓎩 ‧₊˚ ⋅‧₊˚ ⋅ ☕︎ 𓎩 ‧₊˚ ⋅

And now, here we are, this bot is striving, and I can't say I'm surprised ( ◡̀_◡́)ᕤ
My comfort bot (╥‸╥)
creator: bunnybub
